title: We Can Source It Ltd - 500 x 8oz Ripple Brown Kraft Paper Cups - Strong 3-PLY Disposable Insulated Coffee Cups - Leak-Proof Recyclable Drinking Cups for Hot Drinks, Tea, Coffee and Beverages
features: 𝐏𝐑𝐄𝐌𝐈𝐔𝐌 𝐋𝐄𝐀𝐊-𝐏𝐑𝐎𝐎𝐅 𝐃𝐄𝐒𝐈𝐆𝐍: These disposable coffee cups are 15% thicker than standard options, ensuring excellent insulation and leak-proof protection. Serve your guests their favourite coffee or tea without worrying about spills.
𝐓𝐑𝐈𝐏𝐋𝐄-𝐖𝐀𝐋𝐋 𝐈𝐍𝐒𝐔𝐋𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍: These drink cups are customised with a 3-ply ripple effect that retains heat while keeping hands comfortable, perfect for hot beverages.
𝐕𝐄𝐑𝐒𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐋𝐄 𝐔𝐒𝐀𝐆𝐄: Perfect for coffee, tea, juice, and more, these brown cups are a practical and stylish choice for any occasion, suitable for professional and home use.
𝐑𝐄𝐂𝐘𝐂𝐋𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄 𝐏𝐀𝐏𝐄𝐑 𝐂𝐔𝐏𝐒: Made from high-quality kraft paper material, these ripple cups provide an eco-conscious choice for sustainable drink service.
𝐃𝐔𝐑𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄 𝐀𝐍𝐃 𝐂𝐎𝐒𝐓-𝐄𝐅𝐅𝐄𝐂𝐓𝐈𝐕𝐄: Made from extra-thick materials, these coffee cups are durable enough for repeated use, offering long-lasting value for personal and business needs.

A BSa DB Merchant video Previous page Next page What materials are used to make these paper coffee cups? Made from 3-ply virgin kraft paper with an iconic ripple design to ensure cups give ample insulation and keep the contents inside warmer for longer. However, the outside of the cup will be cool to touch. Are paper coffee cups recyclable? Yes, These paper cups are made from premium quality food-grade raw materials, these paper cups are recyclable at registered recycling centers, please check with local council. Are these cups suitable for both hot and cold drinks? Yes, the triple layer ripple design provides excellent insulation, making the cups suitable for hot beverages like coffee and tea, as well as cold drinks. Do ripple paper coffee cups require a sleeve? No, Hot paper take-away cups with a corrugated outer paper coating providing insulation from the hot contents. What sizes do paper coffee cups come in? These paper coffee cups come in various sizes including 4oz, 8 oz, 12 oz, and 16oz.
